properties.displayName: Multiple Email Reports with Matching Entities
properties.description: This rule alerts when multiple unique email reports have matching entities such as subject, sender email, sender domain, and/or IP. Investigate the email(s) based on the matched entities to correctly identify if the reported email(s) are true positive malicious.
properties.query:
let threshold = 3
;
let reportEvents = CloudAppEvents
    | where ActionType == "UserSubmission"
    | extend InternetMessageId = extract("InternetMessageId\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend P1Sender = extract("P1Sender\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend P1SenderDomain = extract("P1SenderDomain\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend P2Sender = extract("P2Sender\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend P2SenderDomain = extract("P2SenderDomain\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend SenderIP = extract("SenderIP\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend Subject = extract("Subject\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | extend UserId = extract("UserId\":\"([^\"]+)", 1, tostring(RawEventData))
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        ReportId,
        InternetMessageId,
        P1Sender,
        P1SenderDomain,
        P2Sender,
        P2SenderDomain,
        SenderIP,
        Subject,
        UserId
;
let _SenderIP = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by SenderIP
    | where Count >= threshold
    | project SenderIP
;
let _P1Sender = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by P1Sender
    | where Count > threshold
    | project P1Sender
;
let _P1SenderDomain = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by P1SenderDomain
    | where Count > threshold
    | project P1SenderDomain
;
let _P2Sender = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by P2Sender
    | where Count > threshold
    | project P2Sender
;
let _P2SenderDomain = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by P2SenderDomain
    | where Count > threshold
    | project P2SenderDomain
;
let _Subject = reportEvents
    | summarize Count = count_distinct(ReportId) by Subject
    | where Count > threshold
    | project Subject;
reportEvents
    | where SenderIP has_any (_SenderIP) or 
    P1Sender has_any (_P1Sender) or
    P1SenderDomain has_any (_P1SenderDomain) or 
    P2Sender has_any (_P2Sender) or
    P2SenderDomain has_any (_P2SenderDomain) or 
    Subject has_any (_Subject)
